issues.description: Duration should be 'DuringThisBattle' not 'EndOfBattle' for counter effects that explicitly state 'during this battle'
Second effect with trigger 'Trigger' and KO with maxCost:4 has no basis in card text. The card only describes one sequence: PowerBoost then KO (cost ≤3). This extra effect should be removed entirely.
Target should specify 'active' Characters as stated in text ("active Characters with a cost of 3 or less"). Current scope lacks this qualifier.
